_comment: Config-driven LLM token pricing for Conduit cost analytics (World B). This file is the SINGLE source of pricing truth. scripts/seed-langfuse-models.py registers each entry in Langfuse's model config so Langfuse auto-computes per-observation cost from token counts; the gateway insights module reads the same file to apply the `default` fallback rate to any model Langfuse did not price (flagged `estimated`). NO prices are hardcoded in gateway Java. Prices verified 2026-07-04.
